## edu-cli learning-plan versions

List version history of a learning plan (查看学习计划历史版本)

```
edu-cli learning-plan versions [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for versions
      --page int        Page number (default 1)
      --page-size int   Page size (default 20)
      --plan-id uint    Learning plan ID (required)
```
